caption: A woman with blonde dreadlocks tied back and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt sits in a recording studio. She is positioned in profile, facing left with a slight smile. A professional black microphone stands on a mount directly in front of her. To her left, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in large red letters, with "Employee Only" written in smaller text above. To her right, a yellow vertical stripe separates the wall from a black acoustic panel. On the bottom of the screen, the text "TALK 101 PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101" are visible, alongside a logo featuring a white microphone and the text "By: 11 logo Studio". Across the frames, the woman remains in a consistent pose and position, with very minimal movement in her facial expression, suggesting a steady shot during a conversation or recording session.
